Create a complex E2E test for the LambdaTest E-commerce playground. 
Workflow:
1. Start at https://ecommerce-playground.lambdatest.io/
2. Click 'Shop by Category' and select 'Laptops & Notebooks'.
3. Select any product (e.g., MacBook or Nikon D300).
4. On the product page, verify the title and click the add to cart button (identified as [aria-label="2-3 Days"] or similar product action button).
5. Click the 'Checkout' button from the cart notification or header.

inputSummary.testDescription:
A 5-page E2E purchase flow on LambdaTest eCommerce playground.
Steps:
1. Start on Home Page (https://ecommerce-playground.lambdatest.io/)
2. Navigate to a Category (e.g., Laptops & Notebooks) by clicking on the category from the menu/home.
3. Select a Product from the Category page to view the Product Details page.
4. Add the product to the Cart from the Product Details page, then view the Cart.
5. Proceed to Checkout from the Cart page.
